title: Is it not possible to create 2 tunnels simultaneously?
excerpt: I am trying to create 2 tunnels, for 2 different quickstart tutorials simultaneously, but am only able to create one. While creating the second one, it gives the error “Creating tunnel connection [FAILED: Failed to creat…

posts.author: ArkiTech (ArkiTech)
posts.cookedHtml: I am trying to create 2 tunnels, for 2 different quickstart tutorials simultaneously, but am only able to create one. While creating the second one, it gives the error “Creating tunnel connection [FAILED: Failed to create tunnel connection.]”.

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @ArkiTech and welcome to the community!

I hope you like it here

You can, if you use the same port:

mapps tunnel:create --help

mapps tunnel:create -p 8080 -a 1234
mapps tunnel:create -p 8080 -a 4321

But you can not do it using different ports.

Cheers,
Matias
